Bug / Task Description: Bounded-load consistent hashing assigns a key to a node within its load bound and must keep the aggregate load counter consistent with the per-node counters. On the normal within-bound assignment path the per-node load is bumped but the running total is not, so the reported total load drifts below the true number of outstanding assignments. The over-bound fallback updates both, hiding the bug whenever the bound is hit.
Commit Subject: fix(consistent): keep aggregate load consistent on assignment
